entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that necessitate resilient farming systems

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment through depletion of resources

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FARMING METHODS
entities.description: Agricultural practices that are environmentally sound and viable for long-term use

entities.name: RESILIENT CROPS AND SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems and crops capable of adapting to and mitigating climate change

entities.name: UNDERNUTRITION
entities.description: A deficiency in caloric intake and essential nutrients

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A lack of essential vitamins and minerals in the diet

entities.name: NON-COMMUNICABLE DISEASES
entities.description: Chronic diseases that are not transmitted from person to person

entities.name: STAPLES
entities.description: Crops that dominate farming systems and diets

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Resilient, ancient grains used as staples for nutrition security

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A specific type of grain included within the millet category

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Extreme heat conditions that crops must survive

entities.name: MARGINALISED LAND
entities.description: Land with low productivity and poor soil quality

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to control pests

entities.name: FERTILISERS
entities.description: Substances added to soil to increase nutrient content

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: Essential liquid resource required for crop growth
